rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Gov't Code §1372.0223, which governs state ceiling allocations for qualified mortgage bond issuers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 1372.0223. DEDICATION OF PORTION OF STATE CEILING TO CERTAIN ISSUERS OF QUALIFIED MORTGAGE BONDS.
_note: No conflict; the rule addresses mortgage bond ceiling allocations, not property tax homestead exemptions.
